channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Former Bosso hitman signs for Hardrock FC @bulawayo24
item.description: Hardrock FC have strengthened their Premier Soccer League title ambitions with the signing of Zimbabwe international Prince Dube.The 28-year-old striker was unveiled at Chahwanda Stadium on Thursday,... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe: Building a Stronger birth registration system through community voices @zimsituation
item.description: For some, registering a child’s birth is not simply a visit to a government office. It is a journey shaped by distance, uncertainty. Source: Zimbabwe: Building a Stronger birth registration system through community voices | UNICEF Zimbabwe Across Zimbabwe, particularly in remote and border communities, many parents understand why birth registration matters. The challenge is [...] The post Zimbabwe: Building a Stronger birth registration system through community voices appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: 59,000 Zimbabweans repatriated from South Africa @bulawayo24
item.description: The Government of Zimbabwe says a total of 58,768 Zimbabwean nationals had returned from South Africa by 2 July 2026, as authorities continue to coordinate one of the country’s largest repatriation an... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s online casino scene is quietly heating up as more players log in @zimsituation
item.description: Online casinos are getting more popular in Zimbabwe. More people are checking out these digital gaming platforms as habits shift and there’s a growing interest in easy, at-home entertainment. Ten years ago, if you told someone in Zimbabwe that they could sit at home in Harare or Bulawayo, spin a roulette wheel or play blackjack [...] The post Zimbabwe’s online casino scene is quietly heating up as more players log in appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: ASSOCIATE LEAGUE: Kamwemba Century Leads Mash East to Big Win @3menonaboat @ZimCricketv
item.description:
Ryan Kamwemba showed his growing influence on this season’s 2026 Zimbabwe Cricket Associate League.

The post ASSOCIATE LEAGUE: Kamwemba Century Leads Mash East to Big Win first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

Ernest Masuku, Innocent and Wessly Madhevere called back into the squad

item.title: NetOne Joins Nationwide Clean-Up Drive @263Chat @NetOneCellular
item.description: State-owned mobile network operator NetOne joined communities across Zimbabwe on Friday in a nationwide clean-up campaign aimed at promoting environmental protection and public health. The campaign, held in Harare, Chitungwiza, Masvingo, Bindura, Bulawayo, Nyanga and Zvishavane formed part of Zimbabwe’s monthly National Clean-Up Day programme [...] The post NetOne Joins Nationwide Clean-Up Drive appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe Economy Holds Firm on 5% Growth Outlook Amid Global Headwinds
item.description: HARARE – Zimbabwe’s economy remains on track to achieve its projected 5 percent real GDP growth this year, supported by resilience in mining, a stabilising agricultural sector, and ongoing policy reforms aimed at improving the investment climate, government officials and economists have said. Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion Minister Professor Mthuli Ncube has maintained [...] The post Zimbabwe Economy Holds Firm on 5% Growth Outlook Amid Global Headwinds appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: EU co-finances Rwanda’s deployment in Mozambique
item.description: MAPUTO,- Mozambique’s Daniel Chapo, announced that the European Union will contribute to the financing of Rwanda’s mission to combat terrorism in Cabo Delgado. The Head of State explained that “the operations of the Rwandan forces will be funded by public funds and those coming from the European Union itself, as has always been done, both [...] The post EU co-finances Rwanda’s deployment in Mozambique appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Reimagining Cold Storage Commission: A New Blueprint for Zimbabwe’s Agricultural Value Chain
item.description: BULAWAYO – Although the government’s previous blueprint for the Cold Storage Commission (CSC) ultimately failed to achieve its intended objectives, the institution’s original strategic rationale remains highly relevant to Zimbabwe’s contemporary agricultural economy. By Our Insights Team Rather than viewing the CSC solely through the lens of its unsuccessful partnership with Boustead Beef, policymakers should [...] The post Reimagining Cold Storage Commission: A New Blueprint for Zimbabwe’s Agricultural Value Chain appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Armed robbers rape 2 Harare sisters without protection, force 14-year-old boy to also have lula lula with his sister
item.description: Armed Robbers Rape Two Harare Sisters, Force Teenager to Abuse Cousin in Harrowing Home Invasion HARARE — A quiet Monday morning in the western outskirts of Harare was shattered by a brutal home invasion in Whitecliff, where two armed robbers subjected a family to unspeakable violence. In a disturbing display of depravity, the intruders not [...] The post Armed robbers rape 2 Harare sisters without protection, force 14-year-old boy to also have lula lula with his sister first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.description: By A Correspondent| The Air Force of Zimbabwe is mourning the death of Wing Commander John Katandika, whose passing was... Continue reading "Conspiracy Claims Emerge After Death of Air Force Officer as Questions Swirl Around Military Losses" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe Introduces Flexible Customs Measures to Ease Return of Citizens From South Africa
item.description: Zimbabwe Introduces Flexible Customs Measures to Ease Return of Citizens From South Africa The Government has approved a flexible customs administration mechanism designed to make it easier for Zimbabweans returning from South Africa to bring their personal belongings and selected assets back home. The Ministry of Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion said the temporary [...] The post Zimbabwe Introduces Flexible Customs Measures to Ease Return of Citizens From South Africa appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Chamuka urges national unity, says Zimbabwe must choose economy over politics
item.description: By A Correspondent| People’s Unity Party (PUP) leader Herbert Chamuka has called for a new era of political cooperation in... Continue reading "Chamuka urges national unity, says Zimbabwe must choose economy over politics" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: George Charamba Tells Returning Zimbabweans: ‘South Africa Is No Longer an Option’
item.description: George Charamba Says SA Door Is Closed, Calls on Returnees to Build Zimbabwe Presidential spokesperson George Charamba has urged Zimbabweans returning from South Africa to view their homecoming as permanent, arguing that the time has come for them to rebuild their lives and contribute to the country’s development instead of seeking opportunities across the border. [...] The post George Charamba Tells Returning Zimbabweans: ‘South Africa Is No Longer an Option’ appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
